name: Jar Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the jars: Sterilize as many canning jars as needed and ensure the lids are new.
2. Mix dry ingredients: In a large bowl, combine flour and baking powder; set aside.
3. Mix wet ingredients: In another bowl, whisk together sugar, eggs, milk, melted butter, and oil until well blended.
4. Combine both mixtures: Gradually add the dry mixture to the wet mixture, stirring just until combined.
5. Fill jars: Pour the batter into prepared jars, filling them about 1/2 full.
6. Bake: Place the jars on a baking sheet and bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for approximately 35-40 minutes. Check the cakes at 25-30 minutes to ensure they haven't risen too much.
7. Cool: Allow the cakes to cool completely before removing them from the jars.
Yield: 1 serving
Warnings:
- Do not overfill the jars; leave about 1/4 to 1/2 inch of space from the top.
- The cakes should slide easily out of the jars if they are properly prepared.
- If you notice any leakage or a broken seal, discard the cake immediately.
Storage: Store the filled jars in a cool, dry place. They can be safely stored for up to 6 months without refrigeration. Check the seals periodically by pressing down on the lid; if it moves, dispose of the cake to prevent spoilage.
